name: STrust Co.,Ltd.
summary: STrust Co.,Ltd. engages in the real estate business in Japan. The company primarily sells condominiums. It is also involved in real estate agency and leasing businesses, as well as the management of condominiums. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shimonoseki, Japan. STrust Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Saibu Gas Co., Ltd.
